steps.title: Identify the contrast the blank must express
steps.content: The text contrasts 1970s feminist writing with 1920s–1960s texts whose politics were “less deliberately signaled.” The blank modifies the 1970s feminist mode, so it must mean openly or without concealment — the opposite of understated.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — a prudently: Prudently means cautiously, which describes the 1920s–1960s authors who held back — not the openly political 1970s authors. Contradicts the contrast. ✗
  • Choice B — an overtly: Overtly means openly and without concealment, directly opposing “less deliberately signaled.” Matches the contrast. ✓
  • Choice C — a cordially: Cordially means politely — the passage contrasts deliberateness of political expression, not tone of politeness. Wrong word meaning. ✗
  • Choice D — an inadvertently: Inadvertently means unintentionally — the opposite of “deliberately,” so it would eliminate the contrast entirely. Wrong word meaning. ✗
B is correct.
